name: Chocolate Walnut Creams
recipeInstructions: Combine sugar, corn syrup, and heavy cream in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches 244 degrees F (118 degrees C). Remove from heat and stir in melted semisweet chocolate, marshmallow creme, water fondant, and vanilla until smooth. Stir in chopped walnuts and spread the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan. Cut into squares when firm.
